description: Bash test scripts failed silently on Windows/Git Bash due to set -e combined with ((TESTS++)) which returns exit code 1 when incrementing from 0
root_cause: In bash, ((expr)) returns exit code 1 when result is 0. ((0++)) evaluates to 0 before increment, triggering set -e
solution: Replaced ((VAR++)) with VAR=$((VAR + 1)) and removed set -euo pipefail

description: Node.js JSON parsing failed when file paths contained spaces (OneDrive/Desktop)
root_cause: String interpolation in node -e put unquoted paths with spaces into JS code
solution: Used process.argv[1] instead of string interpolation: node -e '...' "$filepath"

description: Skill description length check measured 2 chars for multiline YAML descriptions (| syntax)
root_cause: grep '^description:' only captures the line with '|', not the actual content on following lines
solution: Added detection for | and > YAML multiline indicators, then used sed to extract content between description: and next frontmatter key
failed_approaches: Matching '"$' as multiline indicator (matched inline quoted strings too)

description: sharepoint-pull-check.ps1 warf 'Es ist nicht moeglich, einen Index auf ein NULL-Array anzuwenden' bei Handoff-Dateien ohne target_agent-Frontmatter (z.B. INDEX.md im 01_HANDOFFS-Ordner)
root_cause: Direktzugriff ($head | Select-String '^feld:...').Matches.Groups[1].Value — Select-String liefert bei keinem Treffer $null, der Index-Zugriff darauf wirft. PowerShell-Frontmatter-Parsing braucht einen Match-Guard pro Feld.
solution: Get-FmField-Helper: Select-String-Ergebnis erst in Variable, nur bei Treffer .Matches.Groups[1].Value, sonst leerer String; Anzeige-Fallback '?' fuer fehlendes target_agent
